title: MBA / PGDM Jobs 2026 – Placement Officer
shortInfo: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Placement Officer. Candidates with MBA Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 12-05-2026, and closes on 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIT Calicut official website.

basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Placement Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Placement Officer. Candidates with MBA Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 12-05-2026, and closes on 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIT Calicut official website.

application_fee.details: The maximum age limit for candidates is 44 years.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the NIT Calicut Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.details: Master's Degree in Management (MBA) with at least two years prior experience in placement-related activities in reputed Engineering, Management, and/or Science institutions. Preference will be given to candidates with at least two years of experience in the relevant works at CFTIs.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Calicut to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut Placement Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the NIT Calicut Placement Officer position is 02 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Placement Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Management (MBA) to be eligible for the Placement Officer position at NIT Calicut.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Placement Officer role?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Placement Officer position is less than 45 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Placement Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated monthly remuneration ranging from Rs. 75,000 to Rs. 1,00,000/-, based on their experience.

faq.question: How can I apply for the NIT Calicut Placement Officer job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official recruitment portal of NIT Calicut. The application link and further instructions are provided in the article.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. SC/ST/Women/ESM/PwBD candidates need to pay Rs. 500, while other candidates must pay Rs. 1000.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Placement Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve a skill test and/or trade test conducted by the selection committee. The Institute's decision will be final.

faq.question: What is the type of job offered?
faq.answer: The Placement Officer position is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Does NIT Calicut offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific information on age relaxation.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct link to download the official notification PDF is available in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
